li.label: decorated
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been recognized for distinguished service. [PAWN_possessive] bearing reflects the quiet confidence of someone who has proven themselves under pressure.

li.label: honored
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been recognized many times for exceptional service. [PAWN_possessive] reputation precedes [PAWN_objective], and others in the colony look to [PAWN_objective] for strength in difficult times.

li.label: exalted
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] stands among the most celebrated figures the colony has ever known. [PAWN_possessive] name carries weight, and [PAWN_possessive] presence alone is enough to steady the nerves of those around [PAWN_objective].
